top_signals.title: Oil Edges Lower as Traders Assess US-Iran Hostilities
top_signals.summary: Oil edged lower as traders assessed renewed US strikes against Iran, with the limited scope of the hostilities prompting bets that energy shipments through the Persian Gulf will resume their recent recovery.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
